name: mcp-integration
description: MCP server routing, fallback strategies, and availability management

filesystem.purpose: File system operations beyond native Read/Write/Edit tools
use_when: Need to list directory trees with size information
Need atomic file operations across multiple files
Working with files outside the standard workspace
do_not_use_when: Simple file reads (use native Read tool)
Simple file edits (use native Edit tool)
File search by pattern (use native Glob tool)

serena.purpose: Symbol resolution and semantic code operations
use_when: Need to find symbol definitions across a large codebase
Performing safe renames with reference tracking
do_not_use_when: Simple text search (use native Grep tool)
Known file location (use native Read tool)

context7.purpose: External library documentation and framework references
use_when: Need up-to-date documentation for a specific library version
Checking API compatibility between library versions
do_not_use_when: Working with well-known standard library functions
Agent already has domain expertise for the framework

bash.purpose: Shell command execution for build, test, and system operations
use_when: Running build commands (cargo build, npm install, etc.)
do_not_use_when: Native Bash tool is available and sufficient

fallback_strategy.serena_unavailable: Use native Grep for text-based symbol search and Edit for renaming
fallback_strategy.filesystem_unavailable: Use native Read/Write/Glob tools for all file operations
fallback_strategy.context7_unavailable: Rely on agent's built-in knowledge and web search if available
fallback_strategy.bash_unavailable: Use native Bash tool for command execution

architecture_notes.single_source: All MCP servers defined in .mcp.json at project root
architecture_notes.reference_only: This hook documents routing decisions, does not define servers
architecture_notes.auto_allow: All MCP servers configured with alwaysAllow for frictionless usage

troubleshooting.server_not_starting: Check npx can download the package; verify network access
troubleshooting.fallback_activated: Normal behavior when server unavailable; check logs for root cause
